Query.SQL: SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "CO.CO_NUMBER", CO.OLD_NUMBER AS "CO.OLD_NUMBER", CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE", CRT.NAME AS "CRT.NAME", CO.CO_TYPE AS "CO.CO_TYPE", CO.CO_STATUS AS "CO.CO_STATUS", CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "CO.DEBTOR_NAME", CO.APPLN_RECEIVED_DATE AS "CO.APPLN_RECEIVED_DATE", CO.ORDER_DATE AS "CO.ORDER_DATE", CO.COMP_TYPE AS "CO.COMP_TYPE", CO.COMP_RATE AS "CO.COMP_RATE", CO.DIVIDEND_TARGET AS "CO.DIVIDEND_TARGET", CO.FEE_RATE AS "CO.FEE_RATE", CO.ADHOC_DIVIDEND AS "CO.ADHOC_DIVIDEND", CO.INSTAL_AMOUNT AS "CO.INSTAL_AMOUNT", CO.INSTAL_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "CO.INSTAL_AMOUNT_CURRENCY", CO.FREQUENCY AS "CO.FREQUENCY", CO.FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE AS "CO.FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE", CO.REVIEW_DATE AS "CO.REVIEW_DATE", CO.REVOKED_DISCHARGED_DATE AS "CO.REVOKED_DISCHARGED_DATE", CO.DEBTOR_OCCUPATION AS "CO.DEBTOR_OCCUPATION", CO.PAYROLL_NUMBER AS "CO.PAYROLL_NUMBER", CO.NAMED_EMPLOYER AS "CO.NAMED_EMPLOYER", CO.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_RATE AS "CO.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_RATE", CO.PER_CURRENCY AS "CO.PER_CURRENCY", CO.FEE_AMOUNT AS "CO.FEE_AMOUNT", CO.FEE_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "CO.FEE_AMOUNT_CURRENCY", CO.COURT_OF_TRANSFER AS "CO.COURT_OF_TRANSFER", CRTTRAN.NAME AS "CRTTRAN.NAME", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM CO_EVENTS COE WHERE COE.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND COE.STD_EVENT_ID = 920 AND COE.EVENT_DATE > SYSDATE-1 AND COE.EVENT_DATE < SYSDATE+1) AS "COE.EVENT_920_TODAY", ( SELECT NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = CO.CO_NUMBER AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RETENTION_TYPE = 'AO/CAEO') AS "MONIES_IN_COURT", ( SELECT DECODE(NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0),0,'N','Y') FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = CO.CO_NUMBER AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RETENTION_TYPE = 'AO/CAEO' AND TRUNC(PY.RELEASE_DATE) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AS "RELEASEABLE", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM PAYABLE_ORDERS PO , DEBT_DIVIDENDS DD WHERE DD.DD_CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND DD.CREATED = 'N' AND (DD.DD_PO_NUMBER = PO.PO_NUMBER OR DD.DD_PPL_NUMBER = PO.PO_NUMBER) ) AS "DIV_IN_PROGRESS", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'CO' AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = CO.CO_NUMBER AND NVL(PY.OVERPAYMENT_AMOUNT, 0) > 0 AND NVL(PY.ERROR_INDICATOR,'N') != 'Y' AND PY.OVERPAYEE_NAME IS NULL ) AS "UNRES_OVRPAY", ( SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM PAYABLE_ORDER_HEADER POH WHERE POH.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE) AS "PREPAYOUT_LIST_RUN", ( SELECT NVL(SUM(DV.DIV_FEE),0) FROM DIVIDENDS DV WHERE DV.DIV_CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND DV.CREATED = 'Y' ) AS "TOTAL_FEES_PAID", 'GA' AS "GA_TABLE_ALIAS", 'EXISTING' AS "EXISTING_VALUE", CO.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CO_ORA_ROWSCN", CRT.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CRT_ORA_ROWSCN", CRTTRAN.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CRTTRAN_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO, COURTS CRT, COURTS CRTTRAN WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND CRT.CODE = CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AND CRTTRAN.CODE (+)= CO.COURT_OF_TRANSFER

Query.Join: GA.CO_NUMBER = ${CO.CO_NUMBER} AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO DEBTOR' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID
GA.CO_NUMBER = ${CO.CO_NUMBER} AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO EMPLOYER' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID
